Student Welfare Counsellor Committee Anti Ragging Committee SC/ST Cell Contact STUDY IN INDIA X TNEACODE 2739 Campus tour Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 SUBSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT GOALS SDG Introduction The United Nations Transforming Our World: The 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development stands as one of the most ambitious and significant global agreements in recent history. Central to this agenda is the 17 Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs), which serve as a comprehensive guide to addressing the world’s most urgent challenges, including the eradication of poverty, the promotion of economic prosperity, social inclusion, environmental sustainability, and the establishment of peace and good governance in all countries by 2030. To achieve this, a comprehensive, whole-of-Sri Eshwar approach is imperative, where the administration, teaching and learning, research departments, and quality assessment divisions can leverage the following steps to initiate and deepen their engagement with the SDGs: Mapping Current Initiatives: Assessing and documenting existing efforts aligned with the SDGs. Building Internal Capacity and Ownership : Fostering a culture of understanding and commitment to the SDGs within the Sri Eshwar. Identifying Priorities, Opportunities, and Gaps : Recognizing key areas of focus, potential opportunities for impact, and areas requiring attention. Integrating, Implementing, and Embedding the SDGs: Seamlessly incorporating the SDGs into Sri Eshwaral strategies, policies, and plans. Monitoring, Evaluating, and Communicating Progress: Systematically tracking, assessing, and reporting on actions taken towards the SDGs. By implementing these strategies and fostering a culture that supports sustainable practices, Sri Eshwar can play a pivotal role in advancing the SDGs within their spheres of influence and beyond. Sustainable Development Goals No Poverty Eradicating poverty ensures dignity, equality, resilience, and opportunity, uplifting vulnerable populations toward sustainable, inclusive development. KNOW MORE Zero hunger Ending hunger strengthens nutrition, resilience, productivity, and food systems, ensuring equitable access for all people. KNOW MORE Good health and well-being Promoting health and wellbeing enhances longevity, productivity, equity, resilience, and sustainable societal development globally outcomes. KNOW MORE Quality education Quality education empowers minds, reduces inequality, drives innovation, builds skills, and enables lifelong opportunities worldwide. KNOW MORE Gender equality Gender equality unlocks human potential, ensures rights, strengthens economies, fosters justice, and transforms societies everywhere. KNOW MORE Clean water and sanitation Clean water and sanitation protect health, dignity, ecosystems, productivity, and resilience for communities worldwide today. KNOW MORE Affordable and clean energy Affordable clean energy powers development, reduces emissions, improves livelihoods, innovation, resilience, and energy security globally. KNOW MORE Decent work and economic growth Decent work and growth create jobs, reduce poverty, boost productivity, inclusion, and shared prosperity sustainably. KNOW MORE Industry, Innovation, and Infrastructure It drives industrialization, and sustainable economic progress worldwide today KNOW MORE Reduced inequality Reducing inequalities promotes fairness, social cohesion, opportunity, inclusion, stability, and balanced development across all societies. KNOW MORE Sustainable cities and communities Sustainable cities enhance livability, resilience, safety, inclusiveness, efficiency, culture, and environmental stewardship for present generations. KNOW MORE Responsible consumption and production Responsible consumption and production minimize waste, conserve resources, cut pollution, and support circular economies globally. KNOW MORE Climate action Climate action safeguards ecosystems, livelihoods, health, economies, and future generations from escalating risks worldwide urgently. KNOW MORE Life below water Protecting oceans preserves biodiversity, food security, livelihoods, climate regulation, and marine ecosystems for humanity’s future. KNOW MORE Life on land Life on land conservation sustains biodiversity, ecosystems, livelihoods, climate balance, and planetary health for survival. KNOW MORE Peace, justice and strong institutions Peace and justice strengthen trust, rights, stability, governance, inclusion, and sustainable development across all nations. KNOW MORE Partnerships for the goals Global partnerships mobilize resources, knowledge, technology, solidarity, and collective action to achieve goals worldwide together.
